entities.name: Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs)
entities.description: Drawings showing piping and communications as schematic lines and control features as symbols, illustrating the functional relationship of piping, instrumentation, equipment, and controllers.

entities.name: Process Flow Diagrams (PFDs)
entities.description: Drawings with lines for piping and symbols for major components, used to create P&IDs.

entities.name: Instrument Schematics
entities.description: Detailed drawings for particular instruments, showing wiring details and control logic notes.

entities.name: Wiring Diagrams
entities.description: Diagrams showing circuit components as simplified shapes with power and signal wiring between devices.

entities.name: SCADA Network Diagrams
entities.description: Block diagrams showing the basic SCADA architecture and communication channels between devices, controllers, and computers.

entities.name: Logic Diagrams
entities.description: Diagrams conveying control descriptions pictorially, including ladder logic diagrams, binary logic diagrams, and Boolean logic diagrams.

entities.name: Control Loops
entities.description: Systems that maintain a process condition at a set value by adjusting devices based on feedback from instruments.
